steps.title: Track the time shift
steps.content: The passage moves from Brooks's 1990 appointment as director of the National Science Foundation to an event marked by the past perfect phrase "had served." That verb form shows the presidency happened before the 1990 appointment.

steps.title: Select the earlier-time transition
steps.content: Choice A signals a conclusion, not chronology. Choice C signals cause and effect. Choice D introduces an example, but the sentence is moving backward in time. The transition must show that the Black Physicists role came earlier. The answer is B.
